elements.name: Extract Scope 1 and 2 Raw Readings
elements.description: Data-Engineering Pull real-time fuel consumption, electricity usage, steam production, and refrigerant logs from all factory nodes. (ESG Platform Data Warehouse, Apache Kafka) — Monthly, Days 1–5. Output: Raw emission data CSV with 40 site records, timestamp-stamped → ermöglicht Validate Data Completeness and Quality.

elements.name: Validate Data Completeness and Quality
elements.description: Quality-Assurance Check for missing values, outliers, and unit consistency across all 40 sites using automated validation rules. (SAP Analytics Cloud, Python validation scripts) — Monthly, Days 5–7. Output: Data quality scorecard; flagged anomalies list → ermöglicht Reconcile Site-Level Discrepancies.

elements.name: Reconcile Site-Level Discrepancies
elements.description: Operations-Compliance Contact facility managers for missing or anomalous data points; request corrections or explanations. (ServiceNow Ticketing, Email) — Monthly, Days 7–10. Output: Corrected data set or documented exception justification → ermöglicht Aggregate and Standardize Readings.

elements.name: Aggregate and Standardize Readings
elements.description: Data-Engineering Consolidate 40 site records into unified Scope 1 (Direct) and Scope 2 (Indirect) emissions by applying standard conversion factors (kWh→tCO₂e). (SAP, Tableau) — Monthly, Days 10–12. Output: Consolidated monthly emissions report (tCO₂e) by site and scope → ermöglicht Upload to ESG Platform.

elements.name: Gather Manufacturing Phase Emissions
elements.description: Operations-Engineering Aggregate factory-level Scope 1 and 2 emissions and apportion to specific product SKUs using production volume and process time allocation. (SAP ERP, Tableau) — Quarterly, post-emissions collection. Output: Manufacturing emissions per SKU (kg CO₂e/unit) → ermöglicht Calculate Logistics and Transport Emissions.

elements.name: Calculate Logistics and Transport Emissions
elements.description: Logistics-Manager Compute CO₂e from warehousing, distribution center operations, and last-mile delivery using standard transport factors and actual shipping data. (SAP TM, FourKites, Carbon Trust emission factors) — Quarterly, aligned with manufacturing phase. Output: Transport emissions per SKU by geography (kg CO₂e/unit) → ermöglicht Estimate End-of-Life Phase Emissions.

elements.name: Estimate End-of-Life Phase Emissions
elements.description: Sustainability-Engineer Model end-of-life processing (recycling, landfill, incineration) and disposal emissions using industry-standard assumptions and regional waste infrastructure data. (OpenLCA, GaBi database, WFLDB) — Quarterly. Output: EOL emissions per SKU and regional scenario (kg CO₂e/unit) → ermöglicht Aggregate Lifecycle Phases and Calculate Total Footprint.

elements.name: Aggregate Lifecycle Phases and Calculate Total Footprint
elements.description: Sustainability-Analyst Sum embodied, manufacturing, logistics, and EOL emissions; apply GHG Protocol Product Standard allocation rules. (SAP Analytics Cloud, Excel with GHG Protocol templates) — Quarterly, Days 1–5 post-phase data collection. Output: Product Carbon Footprint report per SKU (kg CO₂e/unit); confidence intervals → ermöglicht Validate Against GHG Protocol Standards.

elements.name: Validate Against GHG Protocol Standards
elements.description: Compliance-Officer Review calculations for boundary consistency, emission factor sourcing, and alignment with GHG Protocol guidelines. (GHG Protocol Guidance documents, ServiceNow) — Quarterly, Days 5–7. Output: Validation checklist and sign-off; exceptions documented → ermöglicht Publish Footprint Results to Product Database.

elements.name: Select Representative Supplier and Customer Cohorts
elements.description: Procurement-Analyst Sample 200–400 Tier-1 suppliers and 100–200 Tier-2/3 suppliers representing 70%+ upstream spend; identify 50 representative customer profiles by region and usage pattern. (SAP Ariba, Customer Database, Stratified sampling tools) — Q1–Q2. Output: Supplier cohort list with spend allocation; customer usage profiles by geography → ermöglicht Collect Supplier Upstream Emissions Data.

elements.name: Collect Supplier Upstream Emissions Data
elements.description: Supply-Chain-Manager Request Scope 1 and 2 emissions, raw material sourcing, and sub-tier supply chain data from sampled suppliers via structured questionnaires and supplier sustainability reports. (Supplier Portal, Enveyo, Carbon Trust tool) — Q2–Q3, 90-day collection window. Output: Upstream emissions data from 300–600 suppliers (tCO₂e or proxy estimates) → ermöglicht Model Downstream Product-Use Phase Emissions.

elements.name: Model Downstream Product-Use Phase Emissions
elements.description: Sustainability-Engineer Calculate use-phase emissions for representative appliances using standard operating hours, energy consumption profiles, and regional electricity grid mix factors. (OpenLCA, IVL Swedish Environmental Research Institute data, IPCC default factors) — Q2–Q3. Output: Use-phase emissions model per product category and region (tCO₂e/year of operation) → ermöglicht Aggregate and Extrapolate to Full Scope 3 Baseline.

elements.name: Aggregate and Extrapolate to Full Scope 3 Baseline
elements.description: Sustainability-Analyst Combine supplier cohort data and product-use models; scale to company-wide 2026 baseline using spend and sales volume weighting. (SAP Analytics Cloud, Python statistical extrapolation) — Q3, Days 1–10. Output: Comprehensive Scope 3 baseline (tCO₂e) by category; extrapolation methodology documented → ermöglicht Conduct Third-Party Verification of Baseline.

elements.name: Conduct Third-Party Verification of Baseline
elements.description: External-Auditor Engage SBTi-recognized verifier to audit baseline methodology, data sources, and extrapolation assumptions; confirm alignment with GHG Protocol Scope 3 Standard. (Third-party audit platform, SBTi guidelines) — Q3–Q4. Output: Verification report with pass/conditional pass/fail; any exceptions noted → ermöglicht Publish Verified Scope 3 Baseline.

elements.name: Engage Third-Party Assurance Provider
elements.description: Compliance-Officer Submit emissions package to SBTi-approved or Big 4 auditor; schedule review window and provide interim responses to data requests. (Email, Audit Portal, Deloitte/EY/KPMG/PwC platform) — Monthly, Days 15–18. Output: Audit scope confirmation and preliminary data request log → ermöglicht Execute Variance Analysis and Root-Cause Investigation.

elements.name: Execute Variance Analysis and Root-Cause Investigation
elements.description: Sustainability-Analyst Compare month-to-month and year-over-year emissions; investigate >5% variances with facility and supply chain teams to identify operational changes or data anomalies. (Tableau, SAP Analytics, Statistical process control (SPC) charts) — Monthly, Days 18–22. Output: Variance report with documented explanations for >5% fluctuations → ermöglicht Address Auditor Findings and Recommendations.

elements.name: Address Auditor Findings and Recommendations
elements.description: Operations-Compliance Respond to auditor questions, provide clarifications on methodology, supply missing documentation, and agree on remediation timelines for any control gaps. (ServiceNow, Email, Audit collaboration platform) — Monthly, Days 22–28. Output: Auditor sign-off letter or conditional approval with action items → ermöglicht Issue Assured Monthly Emissions Report.

elements.name: Configure Portal Access and Permissions
elements.description: IT-Portal-Admin Set up role-based access control for suppliers (questionnaire entry, document upload, read-only reporting); generate unique login credentials. (Azure AD, Okta, Portal platform (Sustainability Reporting SaaS)) — Week 1–2. Output: Portal configured with 10,000+ user accounts and role assignments → ermöglicht Send Onboarding Invitations and Training Materials.

elements.name: Send Onboarding Invitations and Training Materials
elements.description: Supplier-Engagement-Manager Distribute personalized portal invitations with login instructions, ESG questionnaire templates, document requirements checklist, and FAQ. (Email campaign tool, Sendgrid, Portal messaging) — Week 2, batch send. Output: 10,000+ invitations sent; tracking spreadsheet of delivery status → ermöglicht Monitor Portal Adoption and Usage Metrics.

elements.name: Monitor Portal Adoption and Usage Metrics
elements.description: Data-Analytics Track login rates, questionnaire completion %, document uploads, and time-to-completion; identify low-engagement suppliers. (Portal analytics dashboard, Google Analytics, Tableau) — Weeks 2–8, continuous monitoring. Output: Weekly adoption dashboard; list of non-responsive suppliers → ermöglicht Execute Supplier Engagement and Escalation.

elements.name: Execute Supplier Engagement and Escalation
elements.description: Supplier-Relationship-Manager Send reminder emails and webinar invitations to low-adoption suppliers; escalate non-compliance to procurement category managers and supplier account teams. (Email, Webex, Procurement system, ServiceNow) — Weeks 4–8, tiered approach. Output: Engagement tracking log; escalation tickets for high-value non-responsive suppliers → ermöglicht Close Onboarding Wave and Validate Data Completeness.

elements.name: Integrate External ESG Data Sources

elements.name: Chief Financial Officer
elements.description: Program Sponsor & Budget Owner — Influence: high, Attitude: supportive, Interests: Budget control (25M EUR ceiling over 3 years), Regulatory compliance to avoid fines (CSRD, LkSG, CSDDD), ROI visibility and cost reduction (18K to 6K person-hours)

elements.name: Chief Sustainability Officer
elements.description: ESG Strategy & Science-Based Targets Lead — Influence: high, Attitude: supportive, Interests: Achievement of 1.5°C pathway and 2045 net-zero commitment, Scope 3 baseline verification and supply chain decarbonization, Double materiality assessment governance and stakeholder transparency

elements.name: Executive Board
elements.description: Governance & Strategic Oversight — Influence: high, Attitude: supportive, Interests: Board-level ESG dashboard with real-time KPIs for decision-making, Reputational protection and investor confidence, Zero manufacturing disruption during transformation rollout

elements.name: Group Procurement Director
elements.description: Supplier Master Data & Due Diligence Ownership — Influence: high, Attitude: neutral, Interests: 95% tier-1 supplier coverage by end 2026 without procurement disruption, Supplier self-service portal to reduce manual workload, Integration with SAP Ariba and risk-scoring workflows

elements.name: Group Legal Counsel
elements.description: Regulatory Interpretation & Compliance Risk — Influence: high, Attitude: supportive, Interests: Regulatory interpretation (EU CSRD, LkSG, CSDDD, Green Claims Directive), Audit trail completeness and defensibility, Human rights grievance mechanism documentation and case management

elements.name: Plant Manager (Factory Operations)
elements.description: Scope 1 & 2 Emissions Data Provider & Energy Transition — Influence: medium, Attitude: neutral, Interests: Zero operational disruption during sensor/MES integration, Automated emissions tracking across 40 manufacturing sites, 50% Scope 1+2 emissions reduction pathway alignment by 2030

elements.name: External Auditor (Deloitte)
elements.description: CSRD Audit & Assurance Advisory — Influence: high, Attitude: neutral, Interests: Complete audit trail on all ESG data points for Q1 2026 CSRD report, Platform architecture review for audit-readiness and control design, Evidence collection automation and attestation workflows
